entities.name: pytest
entities.context: testing framework used for running tests

entities.name: scripts
entities.context: directory containing scripts related to tests

entities.name: tests/fixtures/
entities.context: location where test fixtures are stored

entities.name: DLQ
entities.context: Dead Letter Queue related to error handling

relationships.context: pytest is used to run tests defined in scripts
valid_current.json is one of the test fixtures located in the fixtures directory
valid_n1.json is another test fixture in the fixtures directory
invalid_schema.json is a test fixture that tests for invalid schemas
permanent_fail.json triggers non-retriable errors and relates to DLQ
